service3.desc: We connect your ERP, CRM, email, and databases into one ecosystem with automatic data exchange.

service4.title: Audit & Optimization
service4.desc: We analyze your business processes, identify bottlenecks, and propose specific automation solutions.

service5.title: AI Agents & Multi-agent

service6.title: Support & Maintenance

step1.title: Process Audit
step1.desc: We analyze your business processes, identify those with the greatest automation potential, and estimate ROI.

step2.title: Solution Design
step2.desc: We prepare a detailed automation blueprint, select technologies, and define measurable goals.

step3.title: Implementation & Testing
step3.desc: We build, configure, and test robots. Pilot on a test environment, then production deployment.

step4.title: Support & Growth

ai_agents.title: AI Agents Ecosystem
ai_agents.subtitle: The future belongs to intelligent agents that think and collaborate, rather than just follow instructions.
ai_agents.tech_selection: For every challenge, we select the right tool: RPA for repetitive tasks or AI Agents for processes requiring intelligence.
ai_agents.feature1_desc: We create teams of collaborating AI agents, where each specialized agent handles a different stage of the process.
ai_agents.feature2_desc: Agents analyze the business context and make decisions without the need for rigid rules.
ai_agents.feature3_desc: Unlike traditional bots, AI agents learn and adapt to changes in your company's environment.

roi.title: Real Results of Our Actions
roi.subtitle: Depending on the process, we select the best technology: RPA, classic robotization, or advanced AI agents. Our implementations translate into measurable profits.

cases.title: Use Cases
cases.subtitle: Unconventional AI agent applications that can transform your business

case1.title: Multi-Agent AI for CV Screening
case1.desc: A team of AI agents collaborates on recruitment: the first agent analyzes CVs and matches skills to requirements, the second evaluates experience and education, the third generates a ranked shortlist with justifications. The entire process takes minutes instead of days.

case2.title: AI Agent for Competitor Monitoring
case2.desc: An AI agent continuously scans competitor websites, marketplaces, and social media. It tracks price changes, new products, ad campaigns, and market trends. Every day it delivers a concise strategic report with actionable recommendations.

case3.title: AI Compliance Audit Agent
case3.desc: An AI agent tracks changes in laws and industry regulations, compares them against internal company procedures, and automatically identifies compliance gaps. It generates remediation recommendations for the legal team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about automation, RPA, and AI agents
faq.a1: RPA is a technology that creates software robots mimicking human actions in computer systems. A robot can click, enter data, copy files, send emails. It works just like a person, but faster and error-free.
faq.q2: How long does an automation implementation take?
faq.a2: A simple bot can be deployed in 2-4 weeks. Complex processes requiring multi-system integration take 2-3 months. We always start with a pilot to quickly demonstrate value.
faq.q3: How much does process automation cost?
faq.a3: Cost depends on process complexity. Simple automations start at several thousand PLN. Return on investment (ROI) typically occurs within 3-6 months.
faq.a4: No. Automation frees employees from monotonous, repetitive tasks. This allows them to focus on creative, strategic work requiring human judgment.
faq.a5: Any repetitive, rule-based process: document processing, order handling, reporting, data migration, customer service, HR processes, accounting, and many more.
faq.q6: What are AI agents and how do they differ from regular bots?
faq.a6: AI agents are autonomous systems that can independently make decisions, learn from context, and execute complex tasks without constant human oversight. Unlike RPA bots, AI agents understand natural language, analyze data, and adapt to new situations.
faq.a7: A multi-agent system is a team of several AI agents, each specializing in a different task. Agents collaborate, share information, and jointly execute complex processes. For example, one agent analyzes documents, another verifies data, and a third generates the final report.
faq.q8: In which industries do AI agents work best?
faq.a8: AI agents find applications virtually everywhere: from recruitment and e-commerce, through law and finance, to logistics and customer service. Anywhere large-scale data analysis, decision-making, or handling repetitive queries is needed.
